description: Rohu is a freshwater carp widely farmed in South Asia, known for its fast growth and adaptability to ponds and rivers.
Catla is a large freshwater carp valued in aquaculture for its rapid growth and high market demand.
Tilapia is a hardy freshwater fish widely cultivated due to its tolerance to varying water conditions.
Common Carp is a versatile freshwater fish commonly farmed worldwide for food and ornamental purposes.
Grass Carp is a herbivorous freshwater fish used in aquaculture and aquatic weed control.
Silver Carp is a fast-growing freshwater fish that feeds mainly on plankton.
Mrigal is a bottom-feeding freshwater carp commonly cultured in polyculture systems.
Bighead Carp is a freshwater fish known for its large head and plankton-based diet.
Snakehead is a predatory freshwater fish capable of surviving in low-oxygen environments.
Walking Catfish is a freshwater fish known for its ability to move over land for short distances.
Channel Catfish is a popular aquaculture species valued for its mild-flavored meat.
Pangasius is a freshwater catfish widely farmed for its fast growth and export demand.
Butter Catfish is a freshwater species appreciated for its soft texture and taste.
Yellow Perch is a freshwater fish found in lakes and rivers, popular in recreational fishing.
Bluegill is a small freshwater fish commonly found in ponds and lakes.
Peacock Bass is a large predatory freshwater fish known for its aggressive nature.
Atlantic Salmon is a migratory fish widely farmed in marine and freshwater systems.
Rainbow Trout is a cold-water fish commonly farmed in freshwater aquaculture.
Brown Trout is a freshwater species valued for sport fishing and cold-water habitats.
Milkfish is a coastal fish widely farmed in brackish and marine environments.
Sea Bass is a marine fish cultivated for its high-quality flesh.
Mullet is a coastal fish commonly found in estuaries and shallow waters.
Pearlspot is a brackish water fish popular in South Indian aquaculture.
Red Tilapia is a selectively bred tilapia variety known for its reddish color and fast growth.
Black Carp is a freshwater fish primarily feeding on mollusks.
Goldfish is a freshwater ornamental fish widely kept in aquariums and ponds.
Koi Carp is a colorful ornamental fish bred from common carp.
Eel is a long-bodied fish found in freshwater and marine environments.
Gourami is a freshwater fish popular in aquaculture and aquariums.
Betta is a freshwater ornamental fish known for its vibrant colors and aggressive behavior.
Piranha is a freshwater fish known for its sharp teeth and predatory behavior.
Arapaima is one of the largest freshwater fish species, native to the Amazon basin.
Pacu is a freshwater fish related to piranhas, known for its herbivorous diet.
Sturgeon is a large migratory fish valued for caviar production.
Tuna is a fast-swimming marine fish important in global fisheries.
Mackerel is a marine fish known for its high oil content and nutritional value.
Sardine is a small marine fish commonly found in large schools.
Hilsa is a migratory fish highly valued in South Asian cuisine.
Anchovy is a small schooling marine fish widely used in food processing.
Grouper is a marine fish commonly found near coral reefs.
Clownfish is a small marine fish known for its symbiotic relationship with sea anemones.
Snapper is a marine fish popular in commercial and recreational fishing.
Barracuda is a large predatory marine fish known for its speed.
Flounder is a flatfish species living on the ocean floor.
Halibut is a large flatfish valued for its white meat.
Skate is a bottom-dwelling marine fish related to rays.
Ray is a flat-bodied marine fish commonly found in coastal waters.
Shark is a large predatory fish found in marine ecosystems worldwide.
Seahorse is a small marine fish known for its upright posture and unique reproduction.
Moray Eel is a marine eel commonly found in coral reefs and rocky crevices.
